description_long: This is a brown glass beer bottle with a long neck and a crown cap. The bottle features a blue label that wraps around its body, with bold, cream-colored vertical text reading 'IPA' and additional smaller text below. The label design incorporates wavy, abstract black lines on a blue background, giving it a modern and eye-catching appearance. The back of the bottle displays detailed product information and nutritional facts in smaller print. The bottle's surface appears smooth and glossy, typical of glass, and the label is made of paper or thin plastic. The overall look is clean and contemporary, suitable for display in urban environments such as bars, shops, or outdoor events.
description: A brown glass beer bottle with a blue, wavy-patterned label and bold cream text, capped with a crown cap. The design is modern and visually striking.
description_view_0: The front left side of the bottle shows the blue label with abstract wavy black lines, but the main text is not fully visible.
description_view_1: The back of the bottle displays the product's nutritional and ingredient information in small print on a blue background.
description_view_2: The right side of the bottle reveals part of the main label text 'IPA' and the transition between the front and back label sections.
description_view_3: The front view prominently displays the bold 'IPA' text and the full graphic design of the label.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a blue background with bold, cream-colored vertical text and abstract wavy black lines. The design is modern, with clean typography and a visually dynamic pattern.
